feature.name: Safe YAML load and dump
feature.description: Extract PyYAML's safe YAML parsing and dumping behavior without exposing unsafe object construction.
included_behaviors: parse mappings, sequences, scalars, booleans, nulls, integers, floats, and nested documents
support anchors, aliases, and merge keys with SafeLoader semantics
dump plain Python data through SafeDumper with deterministic sort_keys behavior
reject unsafe Python object tags under safe_load
excluded_behaviors: command line utilities and test fixtures

entanglement.description: Safe YAML load/dump behavior depends on scanner/parser/composer/constructor/dumper pipelines and tag resolution.
signals: anchor, alias, merge key, and tag handling

output.import: from featurelifted import safe_load, safe_dump, YAMLError
